era: Punk/Grunge. E=7 -- THE HIP-HOP ERA IS OVER. 90 degrees of hip-hop (99-188) end. Grunge enters. Mudhoney is the foundational grunge band. v1.49.330.

location.formative: Central District DIY scene. House shows. Green River lineage.

members.name: Mark Arm
members.note: Coined 'grunge.' Green River to Mudhoney. Still active.

members.name: Steve Turner
members.note: Green River to Mudhoney. Raw, distorted tone.

associated_musicians.name: Green River
associated_musicians.relationship: Predecessor band. Mark Arm + Steve Turner to Mudhoney; Stone Gossard + Jeff Ament to Pearl Jam.

theory_nodes.concept: GENRE SHIFT: Hip-hop (99-188, 90 degrees) ends. Grunge enters at 189. The longest genre era ends at its peak (E=8). The axis shifts cleanly to Punk/Grunge.
theory_nodes.description: Genre shift. Hip-hop era over. Grunge enters.

theory_nodes.concept: Sub Pop Records enters the engine. Founded 1986. Mudhoney was the first significant signing. The label that launched grunge.
examples: 'Touch Me I'm Sick' (1988) established the aesthetic.
theory_nodes.description: Sub Pop enters. The grunge label.

theory_nodes.concept: Green River (1984-1988) splits into Mudhoney (raw, underground) and Pearl Jam (arena-ready). Two paths from one source. The split that shaped Seattle music.
examples: Gossard + Ament -> Mother Love Bone -> Pearl Jam.
theory_nodes.description: Green River genealogy. Two paths from one source.

cross_references.relationship: HIP-HOP ERA ENDS! E=8 was the absolute peak. 90 degrees of hip-hop end. Grunge enters at 189.
90 DEGREES! The longest genre era in engine history. 99-188. Ends at peak (E=8).
DEGREE PAIR! Foundational band + deep-water survivor. Both scarred. Both persistent. Total E=11.
